1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: abbreviation, description, entity, human, location, numeric. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

2.mb_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are serving as the automated question classifier for a high-stakes open-domain question answering system used by emergency response teams. It is critical that you quickly and accurately classify every incoming English question into one of the following categories: abbreviation, description, entity, human, location, or numeric. Your classification will determine how the system routes the question for life-saving information retrieval, so precision is essential.
